full_text:
Jiang Bin 蔣斌
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jiang Bin (蔣斌)was born in Xiangxiang county, Lingling commandery. Served Shu as a general under Liu Shan. Later surrendered to Zhong Hui. Jiang Bin was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom.
